cards.name: Queen of Wands
cards.interpretation: confident, self-assured, passionate, determined, social, charismatic, vivacious, optimistic

cards.name: 3 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: gossip, scandal, excess, isolation, loneliness, solitude, imbalanced social life

cards.name: Ace of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: missed chances, scarcity, deficiency, instability, stinginess, bad investments
